code:
fn validate(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> String
  mut result = ""
  mut count = 0
  if name == ""
    result = result + "empty-name"
    count = count + 1
  end
  if age < 0
    if count > 0
      result = result + ","
    end
    result = result + "negative-age"
    count = count + 1
  end
  if age > 150
    if count > 0
      result = result + ","
    end
    result = result + "too-old"
    count = count + 1
  end
  if count == 0
    "ok"
  else
    "errors=" + result
  end
end

print(validate("", -5))
print(validate("Alice", 30))
print(validate("Bob", 200))
